# Marqen Contributing Guide

Thanks for helping improve Marqen.

Marqen is built for people who want to write clear local documents without learning command-line workflows or Markdown internals. Contributions should protect that promise: the product should feel approachable, predictable, and installable through ordinary desktop packages.

## What To Work On

- Improve wording, menus, settings, and flows that ordinary users see.
- Make image, table, export, paste, and file handling more reliable.
- Improve cross-platform installation and first-run behavior.
- Add focused tests for real writing workflows.
- Keep developer-only concepts out of user-facing screens and documentation.

## Issues

Before opening a new issue, search existing issues in this repository. Bug reports are most helpful when they include:

- The Marqen version.
- Your operating system.
- Clear steps to reproduce the problem.
- Screenshots or screen recordings for visual issues.

## Pull Requests

Please keep pull requests focused and describe the user-visible problem they solve. For UI changes, include screenshots or a short recording when possible.

Before submitting code, run the relevant local checks for the part of the project you changed. If you cannot run a check, mention that in the pull request.

## Product Direction

Marqen should keep its main documentation, release notes, and install flow friendly to people who download an installer and open the app. Developer setup details belong in contributor documentation, not in the main README.
